steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option in the dropdown menu under "New Project" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit application interface.
Click on the dropdown item labeled "No Action" within the "Add an action to your declarative agent" menu in the "Create Declarative Agent" interface of Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown in the workspace setup dialog to select or specify the root folder location for the project.
Click on the "appPackage" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to expand or select it.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
file_path="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_eYfFg/appPackage/declarativeAgent.json"

# Check if the file exists
if [ -e "$file_path" ]; then
  # Update 'name' to 'names' in the file
  sed -i 's/"name"/"names"/g' "$file_path"
  echo "Update complete."
else
  echo "File does not exist: $file_path" >&2
  exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0
